examples: An extension of photorealism in which depiction of a subject is indistinguiahable from reality.
Texturing allows us to add photorealism to our scenes by applying photographs and other images onto polygon faces.
White Balance on the renderings and also the contrast is something I find very important when you are looking photorealism.
The challenge, the way to open up new genres, does not depend on photorealism.
In-game graphics will approach photorealism to a degree we see now in movies like Avatar, and it will be hard to distinguish them from reality.
